findings.title: IDOR on /api/orders/{id} exposes other users' orders
findings.description: Sequential order IDs are not authorization-checked; CWE-639.
findings.poc: Authenticated as user A, GET /api/orders/1042 returns user B's order.
findings.remediation: Enforce per-object ownership checks on the order endpoint.

findings.title: SQL injection in product search
findings.description: Error-based SQLi via the q parameter; CWE-89.
findings.poc: q=' UNION SELECT version()-- returns the DB version.

findings.title: SSRF in image-import feature
findings.description: Server fetches an attacker-supplied URL; CWE-918.

findings.title: JWT 'none' algorithm accepted
findings.description: The API accepts unsigned JWTs (alg=none); CWE-347.
findings.poc: Forged token with alg=none grants admin.
